title: Appointments — Heidi Alexander MP
text_excerpt: Appointments — Heidi Alexander MP 0 Skip to Content Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Upcoming Advice Surgeries “Book an appointment to see me.” As part of my promise to be accessible and responsive as your MP, I am holding regular face-to-face surgeries every 2nd and 4th Friday of the month, where we can meet and discuss any concerns or issues you may have. Where a matter can be dealt with by email, you can receive help more quickly by writing to me at Heidi.Alexander.MP@parliament.uk. Upcoming Surgery Dates 10th April, 2026 4pm - 6pm West Swindon 24th April, 2026 4pm - 6pm East Swindon 15th May, 2026 4pm - 6pm Central Swindon 22nd May, 2026 4pm - 6pm West Swindon To request an appointment, send us a message by clicking the button below. Remember to include your full name, address, and brief details of the topic for discussion. You will then be contacted by my office. Strict parliamentary protocol means appointments can only be offered to constituents of Swindon South, in my capacity as your constituency MP. Request an appointment Request an appointment Heidi Alexander Labour MP for Swindon South Secretary of State for Transport Privacy Policy Promoted by Patrick Herring on behalf of Heidi Alexander, both at Suite 11, Marlborough House, 26 High Street, Old Town, Swindon, SN1 3EP Follow Twitter Facebook Instagram
